title: Noah Lucas homepage v023 contact paragraph removal

source.localSource: v022 release with CTA and operating-principles cleanup

changeSummary: Removes the Contact section paragraph beginning: For product leadership, physical AI, autonomy, telemetry, geospatial intelligence, robotics, or investment conversations.
Removes the contact.primary copy node entirely rather than hiding it.
Leaves the Contact CTAs as Get in Touch and LinkedIn.
Keeps the v022 clear liquid-glass pane, mobile nav lock, and working glass selector behavior unchanged.

validation.method: Playwright using local Google Chrome against local v023 preview; Browser/IAB invocation failed because browser.documentation is not a function.
validation.flowUnderTest: v023 homepage preview -> contact paragraph removed -> buttons remain -> glass selector works.
checks: The rejected Contact paragraph is absent from rendered body text.
No data-copy-key="contact.primary" node remains in the Contact section.
The Contact section contains zero paragraph elements.
Contact CTAs remain exactly Get in Touch and LinkedIn.
Hero CTAs remain exactly Get in Touch and LinkedIn.
Glass selector hit target works and switches Thin back to Clear.
Mobile 390px viewport has no horizontal overflow, no nav brand/actions overlap, and selector hit target remains reachable.

supersedesReason: v023 applies the requested Contact paragraph removal on top of the v022 working content/glass release.

productionValidation.reason: Production pointer updated locally; public proof to be recorded after push and GitHub Pages propagation.
